ar.en: Free tier via GitHub PAT (models:read): GPT, Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek
La Plateforme: Mistral Large, Medium, Small, Nemo, Codestral
build.nvidia.com: Llama, Nemotron, DeepSeek, Qwen and more
One key for GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral and 300+ models
No tiers yet. Add a tier to start building your priority list.
Changes are saved automatically and used by the Translate tab.
No API keys yet. Add one above first, then reference it here.
No translation tiers configured. Open Settings → LLM & API Keys and add at least one endpoint.

Build a priority list of model + key endpoints. Within a tier requests rotate round-robin; when a whole tier hits its limits it automatically falls over to the next. Tip: add the same key with different models in one tier to use separate per-model quotas.
Empty tier — add at least one endpoint.
Enter an API key (and model) to enable cloud transcription
✓ Ready to transcribe in the cloud
